content:
STOP AUDITING.

STOP REPORTING THE SAME BLOCKERS.

Execute the remaining deployment until there are no PARTIALLY VERIFIED items.

Complete these items:

1. Wait for the current Render deployment to finish.
2. Verify the deployed SHA matches GitHub HEAD.
3. Verify all production routes.
4. Create any missing Supabase schema or prove it already exists.
5. Register all missing API routes.
6. Verify all deployment commands.
7. Verify all QA commands.
8. Verify chat deployment commands.
9. Verify watchdog.
10. Verify production endpoints.

When Render finishes, retest every feature:

- Featured Properties
- Property Details
- Member Registration
- Email Verification
- SMS Verification
- Members Dashboard
- Investor Dashboard
- CRM
- JV Deals
- Property Admin
- Media Upload
- Instagram Cards
- Likes
- Comments
- Shares
- Saves
- Analytics

Return ONLY live evidence.

For every feature include:

- HTTP status
- Production endpoint
- GitHub SHA
- Render Deploy ID
- Production SHA
- PASS or FAIL

If anything still fails, return the exact HTTP response and the exact root cause.

Do not stop until the deployment currently running has completed and all evidence has been collected.
